title: SpyreTestConfig
description: Configuration schema for the Spyre PyTorch test framework. Enables OOT device backends to reuse upstream PyTorch tests with fine-grained control over which tests run, how failures are treated, and which ops and dtypes are exercised. Reference implementation: IBM Spyre.

files.description: One entry per upstream PyTorch test file to run on this device.

path.description: Path to the upstream test file. Use ${PYTORCH} (resolves via SPYRE_PYTORCH_ROOT) or ${TORCH_SPYRE} (resolves via SPYRE_TORCH_SPYRE_ROOT) tokens.

unlisted_test_mode.description: Mode applied to tests NOT listed under 'tests', or listed without an explicit 'mode'. Default: xfail.

tests.description: Explicit configuration for specific upstream test methods. Tests not listed here are governed by unlisted_test_mode.

global.description: Device-wide capability declaration. All file and test entries operate within these bounds.

supported_dtypes.description: Positive list of dtypes the device hardware supports. Acts as a hard ceiling — no test variant will run with a dtype outside this list unless explicitly added via edits.dtypes.include. If omitted, no dtype filtering is applied.

supported_ops.description: Ops the device supports. Only ops listed here generate test variants. Accepts plain op name strings or structured dicts with per-op overrides. Both formats can be mixed.

oneOf.description: Plain format: op name only, no per-op overrides.

UnlistedTestMode.description: Controls behaviour for tests not explicitly listed or listed without a mode. skip=skip entirely. xfail=run expected to fail (default). xfail_strict=run must fail. mandatory_success=must pass.

TestMode.description: How to treat variants of this specific test at the variant level. Default: mandatory_success. If absent, unlisted_test_mode governs.

NamedItem.description: A named item with an optional description. Dict form for future extensibility.

description.description: Optional free-text description, e.g. reason for include/exclude.

DtypeNamedItem.description: A named dtype item with an optional description.

description.description: Optional free-text description, e.g. reason for include/exclude.

OpsEdits.description: Per-test op list overrides. Controls which ops are included in @ops.op_list for this specific test.

include.description: Inject ops into @ops.op_list for this test. Only needed when the upstream test uses a pre-filtered op list (e.g. binary_ufuncs_with_references) that excludes an op you want to test.

exclude.description: Remove ops from @ops.op_list for this test only. Use when an op is in supported_ops but you want to suppress it for this specific test.

include.description: Inject dtypes for this test only. NOT required to be a subset of global.supported_dtypes — allows testing a new dtype on a single test without committing it globally. Without this, dtype variants missing from upstream @ops(allowed_dtypes=(...)) are never generated.

exclude.description: Suppress dtype variants for this test only. Applied unconditionally — takes precedence over both global.supported_dtypes and edits.dtypes.include.

TestEdits.description: Per-test overrides for ops and dtypes. Scoped to this test only.

TestEntry.description: Configuration shared across one or more upstream test methods. All methods in 'name' receive the same mode, tags, and edits.

oneOf.description: Multiple tests sharing the same mode, tags, and edits.

names.description: One or more ClassName::method_name identifiers. Tests in this list share mode, tags, and edits.

tags.description: Pytest marks applied to all variants of all tests in 'names'.

no_grad.description: Run all variants of all tests in 'names' under torch.no_grad(). Spyre's custom ops have no registered autograd formula, so tests that build modules/tensors with requires_grad=True but never call backward() (e.g. upstream's ModuleInfo-based test_forward) must opt in to avoid AOTAutograd tracing a backward graph at compile time.

Precision.description: Numeric tolerance overrides for a specific (op, dtype) combination.

SupportedOpDtypeConfig.description: Per-dtype configuration within a supported op entry.

name.description: Dtype name. Should be a subset of global.supported_dtypes.

precision.description: Tolerance override for this (op, dtype) combination.

SupportedOpConfig.description: Structured op entry with optional per-op overrides.

name.description: Op name matching OpInfo.name in upstream op_db.

force_xfail.description: If true, flips any mandatory_success variant for this op to xfail at the variant level. Has no effect on xfail or xfail_strict variants.

dtypes.description: Per-dtype configuration for this op including optional precision overrides.
